---
title: "Rāg Kedār"
subtitle: "*uṭhi cale sudina*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Āśakaraṇa &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Suraphāktāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> uṭhi cale sudina nācata re<br>ālī hūn āyī tohe lena

**Antarā**

> lālana terī ārati karata<br>tua sundara naṭanāgara nārī<br>sudina nācata re ālī hūn āyī tohe lena

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Suraphāktāl is a 10-beat cycle. In this layout, it is divided into blocks corresponding to **4 + 2 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered .suraphaktal}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | D |
| **u** | **ṭhi** | **ca** | **le** | **su** | **di** | **-** | **na** | **nā** | **-** |
| P | m | - | m | m | G | P | M | D | - |
| **ca** | **ta** | **-** | **re** | **ā** | **-** | **lī** | **-** | **hūn** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | - | P | - | m | m | R | R | - | S |
| **ā** | **-** | **yī** | **-** | **to** | **-** | **he** | **le** | **-** | **na** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered .suraphaktal}

::: {.notation-table .suraphaktal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D |
| **lā** | **-** | **la** | **na** | **te** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **ā** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ |
| **ra** | **ti** | **ka** | **ra** | **ta** | **-** | **tu** | **a** | **su** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | P | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ |
| **nda** | **ra** | **na** | **ṭa** | **nā** | **-** | **ga** | **ra** | **nā** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | P | m | - | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | D | P |
| **rī** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **di** | **-** | **na** | **nā** | **-** | **ca** |
| m | - | m | - | m | G | P | M | D | - |
| **ta** | **-** | **re** | **-** | **ā** | **-** | **lī** | **-** | **hūn** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | - | P | - | m | m | R | R | - | S |
| **ā** | **-** | **yī** | **-** | **to** | **-** | **he** | **le** | **-** | **na** |

:::
